title: Arbuinia
description: This project is a small modpack focussed on Create including some Vanilla additions. Originally created to play with some friends, trying to achieve a improved Vanilla styled, technical gameplay while keeping a nice balance.
body:
This project is a small modpack focussed on Create including some Vanilla additions. Originally created to play with some friends, trying to achieve a improved Vanilla styled, technical gameplay while keeping a nice balance.

Licensing Attributions:
- Aquaculture 2 by Shadow as found originally on Curseforge at: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
